title: Still, Though The One I Sing
content:
Still, though the one I sing,
(One, yet of contradictions made,) I dedicate to Nationality,
I leave in him Revolt, (O latent right of insurrection! O quenchless, indispensable fire!)
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walt Whitman delivers a powerful performance in "Still, Though The One I Sing"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
